sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40389" key="e)picurhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιξῠρ-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n40389.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must shave</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸν τόπον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Menemach.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:10:15:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.15.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
